name_en: ❤️B's latest pure original soft structured tote bag, crafted from grained calfskin. Handcrafted in an Italian workshop with suede lining. Features the brand's iconic B-shaped closure, smooth calfskin trim with embossed equestrian knight logo (EKD). Includes a detachable shoulder strap for versatile shoulder or handbag styling
name_cn:
❤️B's latest pure original soft structured tote bag, crafted from grained calfskin. Handcrafted in an Italian workshop with suede lining. Features the brand's iconic B-shaped closure, smooth calfskin trim with embossed equestrian knight logo (EKD). Includes a detachable shoulder strap for versatile shoulder or handbag styling
Back features embossed equestrian knight logo (EKD)
Size 35.5 × 18x 28cm
